channel.title: STRATRONIX — English | Private AI-Agent Appliance
channel.description: English content from STRATRONIX — on-premise AI hardware appliances for EU regulated industries.

item.title: EU AI Act 2026: What European SMEs Need to Know | STRATRONIX
item.description: EU AI Act 2026 enforcement timeline, high-risk classification (Annex III), and how on-premise AI hardware helps European SMEs meet Article 14 and Chapter V GDPR.

item.title: STRATRONIX PAA 私有 AI 智能体设备 — 全球 SEO 资源中心
item.description: STRATRONIX 鼎图太易 PAA (Private AI-Agent Appliance) 私有 AI 智能体设备 — 数据主权 / GDPR / 等保 2.0 合规 / 7x24 可靠性。覆盖医疗、法律、制造、金融、教育、政府、SaaS、跨境电商 8 大行业。
